title: UK Parliament Investigates Banks Cutting Off Crypto Businesses
summary: The UK's Crypto and Digital Assets All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) has launched an inquiry into banks that deny services to crypto firms, examining whether these practices are justified or unfairly stifling the sector.
body:
The UK Parliament is investigating why major banks are refusing to provide accounts or services to crypto businesses. The Crypto and Digital Assets All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) is focusing on banks that have either closed accounts or introduced severe restrictions on crypto-related transactions.

The inquiry aims to uncover whether these banking practices are driven by regulatory concerns, risk management, or other factors. The APPG will examine how these actions affect the growth and operation of crypto businesses in the UK, potentially stifling innovation in the sector.

This investigation matters because it could lead to changes in how banks interact with crypto businesses, making it easier for these firms to access essential financial services. If successful, the inquiry might result in new guidelines or policies that ensure fair treatment for crypto companies.

For crypto businesses in the UK, this inquiry is a critical development. If the APPG finds evidence of unfair practices, it could push for regulatory changes that make banking services more accessible. Businesses should watch for updates from the APPG and consider participating in the inquiry if given the opportunity.
twitterThread: UK banks are shutting down crypto business accounts. Now Parliament is investigating why.
The Crypto and Digital Assets APPG is probing banks that refuse services to crypto firms. Could lead to big changes in UK crypto banking.

If you run a crypto business in the UK, watch this inquiry closely. It could make banking easier for you. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-21-uk-parliament-investigates-banks-cutting-off-crypto-businesses
standaloneTweet: UK banks are blocking crypto businesses from basic financial services. Parliament is now investigating—this could change everything.
seoTitle: UK Parliament Probes Banks Denying Crypto Firms Accounts
